Matrix Spins

Last updated: 1 April 2026 · Matrix Spins Casino · msaart.online

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Matrix Spins Casino ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Matrix Spins Casino.

2. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years of age (or the legal gambling age in your jurisdiction, whichever is higher) to use the Platform. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the Platform complies with all applicable laws in your jurisdiction. The Platform may restrict access from jurisdictions where online gambling is prohibited.

3. Account Registration

To play with real money, you must create an account with a valid email address and password. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You may only hold one account. Multiple accounts will be closed, and balances may be forfeited.

Email verification is required before real-money play. Demo mode is available without registration.

4. Account & Funds

Your account balance represents funds held on your behalf by Matrix Spins Casino. All balances are denominated in Australian Dollars (AUD).

4.1 Deposits

Deposits are processed via Stripe using standard payment methods (credit card, debit card, bank transfer). Deposits are credited to your account balance upon successful payment confirmation. You may set deposit limits (daily, weekly, or monthly) via the Responsible Gambling settings.

4.2 Withdrawals

Withdrawal requests are processed within 1–3 business days. The minimum withdrawal amount is $20.00 AUD. A 24-hour hold applies from your last deposit before any withdrawal can be requested. Withdrawals are sent to the same payment method used for your most recent deposit where possible. The Platform reserves the right to request identity verification before processing withdrawals exceeding $2,000 AUD, and requires verification for accounts whose lifetime withdrawals exceed $5,000 AUD.

4.3 Inactive Accounts

Accounts with no login activity for 12 consecutive months may be classified as inactive. A monthly maintenance fee of $5.00 AUD may be deducted from inactive account balances. You will be notified by email before any fees are applied.

5. Game Rules

Matrix Spins Casino offers slot games from multiple game studios. All games use a server-authoritative random number generator (RNG). The client application is a renderer only — it does not determine game outcomes.

Each game displays its Return to Player (RTP) percentage and volatility in the game information panel. The platform target RTP is 88%. The house edge ensures the Platform's long-term profitability.

Game outcomes are determined by a cryptographically secure random number generator (CSPRNG). All outcomes are calculated server-side. Details are available on our Game Fairness page.

6. Bonuses & Promotions

Bonuses (including daily login bonuses, win streak rewards, and promotional offers) are subject to wagering requirements. You must wager the bonus amount a specified number of times before the bonus funds or any winnings derived from them can be withdrawn.

During active wagering requirements, your maximum bet per spin is capped at $10.00 or 10% of the remaining wagering requirement, whichever is lower. The Platform reserves the right to void bonuses and associated winnings if these terms are breached.

7. Technical Disclosure

Player account balances are secured and managed using blockchain-based token technology on behalf of the player.

8. Responsible Gambling

Matrix Spins Casino is committed to responsible gambling. The following tools are available to all players and can be accessed at Responsible Gambling:

  • Session timer and periodic reminders
  • Deposit, loss, and wager limits (daily, weekly, monthly)
  • Reality checks after every 100 spins
  • Cool-off periods (1 hour to 24 hours)
  • Self-exclusion (1 day, 7 days, 30 days, or permanent)

Self-exclusion is irreversible for the chosen period. During exclusion, your account is locked, active sessions are terminated, and promotional communications are suspended. Your balance is preserved and can be withdrawn.

If you believe gambling is becoming a problem, free confidential support is available 24/7 in Australia via Gambling Help Online: call 1800 858 858 or visit gamblinghelponline.org.au. You may also register with the national self-exclusion register, BetStop (betstop.gov.au). Players outside Australia can contact the National Council on Problem Gambling at 1-800-522-4700 (United States) or their local equivalent.

9. Prohibited Conduct

You may not:

  • Use automated software, bots, or scripts to interact with the Platform
  • Exploit bugs, glitches, or errors in game software
  • Collude with other players or engage in any form of fraud
  • Use the Platform for money laundering or any illegal purpose
  • Create multiple accounts or allow others to use your account
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or tamper with game software

Violation of these terms may result in immediate account suspension, forfeiture of balances, and reporting to relevant authorities.

10. Privacy

We collect and process personal data necessary to operate your account, process payments, comply with legal obligations, and prevent fraud. Personal data includes: email address, payment information, IP address, device information, and gameplay history.

We do not sell personal data to third parties. Data may be shared with payment processors (Stripe), fraud prevention services, and regulatory authorities as required by law. For full details, refer to our Privacy Policy.

11. Intellectual Property

All game content, studio branding, graphics, audio, and software on the Platform are owned by Matrix Spins Casino or licensed to us. You may not copy, distribute, or create derivative works from any Platform content without written permission.

12. Limitation of Liability

Matrix Spins Casino is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for: losses resulting from system malfunctions, connectivity issues, unauthorised account access resulting from your failure to secure credentials, or any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

Our total liability to you for any claim arising from your use of the Platform shall not exceed the balance of your account at the time the claim arose.

13. Governing Law & Dispute Resolution

These Terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which the Platform is licensed to operate. Any disputes arising from these terms shall first be addressed through our support team at support@msaart.online. If unresolved after 30 days, disputes shall be submitted to binding arbitration in accordance with the laws of the applicable licensing jurisdiction. The specific licensing authority and jurisdiction applicable to your account is disclosed at the time of deposit and on our licensing page.

13a. Jurisdictional Availability

Real-money gaming services on this Platform are offered only to residents of jurisdictions where such services are legally permitted. In particular, under the Australian Interactive Gambling Act 2001, most online casino-style gaming is prohibited for Australian residents unless offered under a valid Northern Territory or ACT licence. If you are resident in a jurisdiction where this Platform is not licensed to offer real-money gaming, you may not use this Platform for real-money play. The Platform reserves the right to refuse service and void any real-money transactions originating from such jurisdictions.

14. Changes to Terms

We may update these terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email and a banner on the Platform. Continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

15. Contact

For questions about these terms, contact us at: support@msaart.online

Must be 18+ to play. Gambling can be addictive. Play responsibly.
